instanceExperimentalSettings.planDecompositionToggleAria: Toggle task plan decomposition panel experimental setting

instanceExperimentalSettings.autoRestartDescription: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
instanceExperimentalSettings.autoRecoveryDescription: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery tasks for task dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.

instanceGeneralSettings.title: General
instanceGeneralSettings.description: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
instanceGeneralSettings.deploymentLocalTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
instanceGeneralSettings.deploymentAuthPublic: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
instanceGeneralSettings.deploymentAuthPrivate: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
instanceGeneralSettings.censorUsernameDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instanceGeneralSettings.keyboardShortcutsDescription: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating tasks or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instanceGeneralSettings.backupRetentionDescription: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
instanceGeneralSettings.feedbackSharingDescription: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instanceGeneralSettings.feedbackNoDefault: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
instanceGeneralSettings.feedbackDisallowDescription: Keep voted AI outputs local only.

instanceGeneralSettings.feedbackDevRetestPart3: JSON row for this instance, or set it back to

pathInstructionsModal.title: How to get a full path
pathInstructionsModal.macStep1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
pathInstructionsModal.macStep3: Hold the Option (⌥) key — "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
pathInstructionsModal.macStep4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
pathInstructionsModal.macTip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.
pathInstructionsModal.windowsStep1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
pathInstructionsModal.windowsStep2: Click in the address bar at the top — the full path will appear.
pathInstructionsModal.windowsStep3: Copy the path, then paste here.
pathInstructionsModal.windowsTip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".
pathInstructionsModal.linuxStep1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
pathInstructionsModal.linuxStep2: Run pwd to print the full path.
pathInstructionsModal.linuxStep3: Copy the output and paste here.
pathInstructionsModal.linuxTip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

agentConfigPrimitives.helpCwd: Deprecated legacy working directory fallback for local adapters. Existing agents may still carry this value, but new configurations should use project workspaces instead.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpPromptTemplate: Sent on every heartbeat. Keep this small and dynamic. Use it for current-task framing, not large static instructions. Supports {{ agent.id }}, {{ agent.name }}, {{ agent.role }} and other template variables.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpModel: Override the default model used by the adapter.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpThinkingEffort: Control model reasoning depth. Supported values vary by adapter/model.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpChrome: Enable Claude's Chrome integration by passing --chrome.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpDangerouslySkipPermissions: Run unattended by auto-approving adapter permission prompts when supported.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpDangerouslyBypassSandbox: Run Codex without sandbox restrictions. Required for filesystem/network access.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpSearch: Enable Codex web search capability during runs.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpFastMode: Enable Codex Fast mode. This burns credits/tokens much faster and is supported on GPT-5.4 and manual Codex model IDs.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpWorkspaceStrategy: How Paperclip should realize an execution workspace for this agent. Keep project_primary for normal cwd execution, or use git_worktree for issue-scoped isolated checkouts.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpWorkspaceBaseRef: Base git ref used when creating a worktree branch. Leave blank to use the resolved workspace ref or HEAD.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpWorkspaceBranchTemplate: Template for naming derived branches. Supports {{issue.identifier}}, {{issue.title}}, {{agent.name}}, {{project.id}}, {{workspace.repoRef}}, and {{slug}}.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpWorktreeParentDir: Directory where derived worktrees should be created. Absolute, ~-prefixed, and repo-relative paths are supported.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpRuntimeServicesJson: Optional workspace runtime service definitions. Use this for shared app servers, workers, or other long-lived companion processes attached to the workspace.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpMaxTurnsPerRun: Maximum number of agentic turns (tool calls) per heartbeat run.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpCommand: The command to execute (e.g. node, python).
agentConfigPrimitives.helpLocalCommand: Override the path to the CLI command you want the adapter to call (e.g. /usr/local/bin/claude, codex, opencode).
agentConfigPrimitives.helpExtraArgs: Extra CLI arguments for local adapters, comma-separated.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpEnvVars: Environment variables injected into the adapter process. Use plain values or secret references.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpBootstrapPrompt: Only sent when Paperclip starts a fresh session. Use this for stable setup guidance that should not be repeated on every heartbeat.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpPayloadTemplateJson: Optional JSON merged into remote adapter request payloads before Paperclip adds its standard wake and workspace fields.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpWebhookUrl: The URL that receives POST requests when the agent is invoked.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpHeartbeatInterval: Run this agent automatically on a timer. Useful for periodic tasks like checking for new work.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpTimeoutSec: Maximum seconds a run can take before being terminated. 0 means no timeout.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpGraceSec: Seconds to wait after sending interrupt before force-killing the process.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpWakeOnDemand: Allow this agent to be woken by assignments, API calls, UI actions, or automated systems.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpCooldownSec: Minimum seconds between consecutive heartbeat runs.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpMaxConcurrentRuns: Maximum number of heartbeat runs that can execute simultaneously for this agent.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpMaxTurnContinuationEnabled: Automatically queue bounded continuation runs when an adapter stops because its per-run turn cap was exhausted.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpMaxTurnContinuationMaxAttempts: Maximum automatic continuations after one max-turn stop. This is separate from max turns per run.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpMaxTurnContinuationDelaySec: Seconds to wait before starting each max-turn continuation.
agentConfigPrimitives.helpBudgetMonthlyCents: Monthly spending limit in cents. 0 means no limit.
agentConfigPrimitives.specifyPathDescription: Browser security blocks apps from reading full local paths via a file picker. Copy the absolute path and paste it into the input.
agentConfigPrimitives.pasteResultStep: Paste the result into the path input.
agentConfigPrimitives.windowsStep1: Find the folder in File Explorer.
agentConfigPrimitives.terminalStep3: Copy the output and paste it into the path input.

interruptHandoffViews.didYouMeanSuffix: ? Plain text won't notify or assign an agent.
interruptHandoffViews.insertMentionAriaLabel: Insert mention for {{name}} into your comment
interruptHandoffViews.nothingLiveToPause: Nothing live to pause — no agent run is in flight or queued. This records a hold so new work won't start until you resume.

editableSections.concurrencyCoalesceDescription: Keep one follow-up run queued while an active run is still working.
editableSections.concurrencyAlwaysDescription: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if several runs stack up.
editableSections.concurrencySkipDescription: Drop overlapping trigger occurrences while the routine is already active.
editableSections.catchUpSkipDescription: Ignore schedule windows that were missed while paused.
editableSections.catchUpEnqueueDescription: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
editableSections.signingModeBearer: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
editableSections.signingModeHmacSha256: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
editableSections.signingModeGithubHmac: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
editableSections.signingModeNone: No authentication — the webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.
editableSections.defaultAgentRequired: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.
editableSections.variablesHintSuffix: in the title & instructions. The variable name is read-only — rename by editing the placeholder.
editableSections.noVariablesYet: No variables yet. Add a {{token}} in the title or instructions to create one.
editableSections.secretsIntroPrefix: Routine secrets apply to every task this routine creates. They override matching keys in project and agent env.
editableSections.secretSaveNow: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
editableSections.previewTimezoneNote: Preview assumes the previous run is still in flight when the next fires. Times shown in {{timeZone}}.
editableSections.noScheduleTriggerPreview: No enabled schedule trigger to preview. Add a schedule in Triggers to see how this policy treats upcoming fires.

operateSections.noRunsMessage: No runs yet. Trigger a run from the header or wait for the schedule.
